ksa_text: Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata harvesting, lineage visualization, search and discovery mechanisms, data classification, business glossary linkage, and impact analysis features.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data catalog", "data classif"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4081); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 2 job-posting-level and 2 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
